---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that Emberwake doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the capability. If it's substantial, it will likely become a user story in a spec
(see CONTRIBUTING.md and `specs/`).

## User story (optional)

> As a [type of user], I want [capability] so that [value].

## Alternatives considered

## Constitution check

Does this fit the project principles (full-Rust, security-first, performance, single
reproducible artifact)? Note any tension so it can be weighed.

## Additional context
